allow: Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "WhisperAI" to get name of every window')
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "WhisperAI" to get name of every menu bar item of menu bar 1')
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "WhisperAI" to click menu bar item "WhisperAI" of menu bar 1')
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "WhisperAI" to click menu bar item 1 of menu bar 2')
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "WhisperAI" to count windows')
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "WhisperAI" to get every UI element')
Bash(echo "Windows: $\(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "WhisperAI" to count windows'\)")
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "WhisperAI" to get description of every radio button of first tab group of first group of window "WhisperAI Einstellungen"')
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "WhisperAI" to get name of window 1')
Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: WhisperAI macOS app *)
